package.name: cfpa2_collaborative_autonomy
package.description: CFPA2 frontier allocator: coordinator + per-robot tick loops for 2D dual-robot exploration with space-time A* local waypointing. Hot-path numerics (frontier extraction, BFS, info-gain, dead-frontier filter, cluster representatives) are in a ctypes-loaded C++ library; orchestration is still Python and pending a full rclcpp Node port.
